qa_pairs.question: How can users access the job monitoring interface in Open OnDemand to get an overview of their jobs?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can access the job monitoring interface in Open OnDemand by navigating to the "Jobs" tab and then selecting "Active Jobs".

qa_pairs.question: What functionalities are available for managing and viewing jobs within the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Within the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface, users can filter jobs using the "Filter" text box, sort columns by clicking on their headers (e.g., by job status), and view more details about a specific job, such as start/end time or node list, by clicking on the ">" symbol to its left. Users can also choose to show all jobs in the queue by selecting "All Jobs" from the drop-down menu.
